sentiment.summary: The meeting was dominated by concerns and disagreements over the product redesign and timeline. Tensions were high, with multiple speakers expressing frustration and objection to the decisions made. The tone was largely confrontational, with some attempt at resolution towards the end.

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Sarah
speaker_sentiments.notes: Sarah was the most vocal in her opposition to the redesign and expressed strong concerns

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Mark
speaker_sentiments.notes: Mark attempted to maintain a neutral tone but came across as dismissive of others' concerns at times

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Tom
speaker_sentiments.notes: Tom was honest about the unrealistic timeline and expressed frustration with the decision-making process

speaker_sentiments.speaker: David
speaker_sentiments.notes: David tried to keep the meeting on track and facilitate communication, but had limited success
